nasb.text: So David made a name for himself when he returned from killing 18,000 Arameans in the Valley of Salt.

esv.text: And David made a name for himself when he returned from striking down 18,000 Edomites in the Valley of Salt.

cnv.text: 大衛在鹽谷擊殺了一萬八千以東人回來以後，就大有名聲。

ccb.text: 大卫在盐谷杀了一万八千亚兰人，声威大振。
